case_title: MAITZA HUEZO VS. SHANE PAUL MCCRACKEN et al

docket_entries.description: PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF HUEZO, MAITZA AKA ELIZABETH GUESO AS TO DEFENDANT MCCRACKEN, SHANE PAUL GARCIA MARTINEZ, DAISY XIOMARA DOES 1 TO 20 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR JUL-23-2014 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  APR-21-2014 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         JUN-30-2014
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF JUL-23-2014 CONTINUED TO SEP-03-2014 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR OCT-28-2014 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). THE SEP-03-2014 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF OCT-28-2014 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
